catalog_items.description: These breathable tarpaulin covers are designed to regulate temperature, reduce heat buildup, and improve airflow inside poultry sheds. They create a cooler, more controlled environment to maintain hen health, boost productivity, and combat heat stress in livestock.

specifications.Function: Temperature regulation, heat reduction, improved airflow

social_source.caption:
Excess heat inside poultry houses can reduce productivity, increase stress on hens, and impact overall farm performance. High temperatures not only affect egg production but also create uncomfortable and unhealthy conditions for livestock.

ITC breathable tarpaulin covers are designed to regulate temperature, reduce heat buildup, and improve airflow inside poultry sheds. By creating a cooler and more controlled environment, our tarpaulin solutions help maintain hen health, boost productivity, and support efficient farm operations.

Give your poultry the comfort they need to perform at their best.
Keep your house cool. Keep your hens productive.

📞 9562546110 | 9544336110
📧 info@internationaltarpaulin.com

🌐 www.internationaltarpaulin.com

catalog_items.description: Heavy-duty tarpaulin covers designed with UV-resistant and waterproof technology, providing long-lasting durability and dependable protection for crops, firewood, and stored agricultural materials across multiple seasons. They offer industry-grade strength and are available in customizable sizes.

social_source.caption:
Unpredictable weather can cause serious damage to crops, firewood, and stored agricultural materials. Exposure to heavy rain, strong sunlight, and harsh outdoor conditions often leads to spoilage, loss of quality, and reduced productivity.

With ITC heavy-duty tarpaulin covers, you can protect your harvest and materials with confidence. Designed with UV-resistant and waterproof technology, our tarpaulins provide long-lasting durability and dependable protection across multiple seasons. Built with industry-grade strength and available in customizable sizes, they are suitable for a wide range of agricultural and outdoor applications.

Cover smarter, protect better, and reduce losses caused by harsh weather conditions.

📧 info@internationaltarpaulin.com

Unpredictable weather can cause serious damage to crops, firewood, and stored agricultural materials. Exposure to heavy rain, strong sunlight, and harsh outdoor conditions often leads to spoilage, loss of quality, and reduced productivity.

With ITC heavy-duty tarpaulin covers, you can protect your harvest and materials with confidence. Designed with UV-resistant and waterproof technology, our tarpaulins provide long-lasting durability and dependable protection across multiple seasons. Built with industry-grade strength and available in customizable sizes, they are suitable for a wide range of agricultural and outdoor applications.

Cover smarter, protect better, and reduce losses caused by harsh weather conditions.

📧 info@internationaltarpaulin.com
